_meta.reason: AISstream.io aisstream/aisstream#15 known issue fired at 2026-07-14T10:30:00Z — subscription accepted, zero messages delivered across multiple connection attempts. This fallback prepared same-day per Execution Plan §9 Phase 3 done-condition.
_meta.note: These are FALLBACK numbers. If shown during a demo, the narration MUST say: 'AIS is a genuinely live feed; the connection was quiet, so this is a pre-recorded snapshot' per Execution Plan §10.

snapshots.rationale: Strait of Hormuz sees ~30-40 tankers per day in a 24h snapshot window (FINAL_ALIGNED_DOSSIER §0 documents 20+ million barrels/day throughput). 38 is a plausible single-snapshot count.
Jamnagar/Vadinar is India's largest refinery complex (1.24 MMTPA Reliance Jamnagar alone). 12 vessels in a 5-minute snapshot near this port cluster is a conservative, plausible count.
